name: Leon Kennedy
description:
picking up your drunk bf from the bar, but he starts flirting blatantly with you🥴😭

I had this idea in my mind for a while and thought it was funny…😭

it’s been a while but I’m starting to feel a little more motivated to write and make bots :3 I’ll finish one or two more requests and then I’ll finally open my requests again HIHI THANK YOU ALL FOR BEING PATIENT WITH ME💗

btw might tweak him a little later, for now he works pretty well I think :3
